params_echo.purpose: native SSE schema capture for T1c envelope redesign

findings.blocker: dashboard.cohere.com requires authentication. Navigating to https://dashboard.cohere.com redirects to https://dashboard.cohere.com/welcome/login showing Cohere login page with EMAIL/PASSWORD fields, Continue with Google, Continue with Github options. No chat UI is reachable without credentials.

mandatory_fields_status.raw_events: EMPTY — auth gate prevents any prompt submission
mandatory_fields_status.actual_endpoint_url: NONE — no chat endpoint reachable from unauthenticated state

note: Per request notes ('Auth-required 면 classify auth-gate'): this is the documented outcome when a service requires login. For T1c design on cohere, either (a) establish a logged-in session on test PC with cohere credentials, (b) capture events from a different PC that has authentication, or (c) reclassify cohere in services=127 as not-testable-without-auth and skip APF interception for it until credentials available.
errors: cohere dashboard auth-gate; no chat UI accessible without login; test PC has no cohere credentials configured
